spec.title: Connections
spec.description: Number of newly established connections per second to upstream applications.

spec.title: 1xx Requests
spec.description: Requests per second to upstream applications by their actual response code (1xx).

spec.title: 2xx Requests
spec.description: Number of requests with a 2xx response code from application upstreams.

spec.title: 4xx Requests
spec.description: Requests per second to upstream applications by their actual response code (4xx).

spec.title: 3xx Requests
spec.description: Number of requests with a 3xx response code from application upstreams.

spec.title: 5xx Requests
spec.description: Number of requests with a 5xx response code from application upstreams.

spec.title: 4xx Requests
spec.description: Number of requests with a 4xx response code from application upstreams.

spec.title: 3xx Requests
spec.description: Requests per second to upstream applications by their actual response code (3xx).

spec.title: 5xx Requests
spec.description: Requests per second to upstream applications by their actual response code (5xx).

spec.title: Failed Connections
spec.description: Number of failed connections per second to upstream applications.

spec.title: Total Requests
spec.description: Total number of requests from Airlock Microgateway to application upstreams.

spec.title: Total Requests
spec.description: Total requests per second to upstream applications.

spec.expr:
sum (rate(envoy_cluster_upstream_rq{managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`${backend_service:regex}`, envoy_response_code=~"[45].."}[$__rate_interval]))/
sum (rate(envoy_cluster_upstream_rq{managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`${backend_service:regex}`}[1m]))

spec.title: Data received
spec.description: Rate of traffic received from upstream applications.

spec.title: Request Error Rate
spec.description: Percentage of 4xx and 5xx upstream requests.

spec.expr:
sum (increase(envoy_cluster_upstream_rq{managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`${backend_service:regex}`, envoy_response_code=~"[45].."}[$__range]))/
sum (increase(envoy_cluster_upstream_rq{managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`${backend_service:regex}`}[$__range]))

spec.title: Connections
spec.description: Number of newly established connections towards upstream applications.

spec.title: Failed Connections
spec.description: Number of failed connections towards upstream applications.

spec.title: Data sent
spec.description: Total amount of data sent to upstream applications.

spec.title: Data received
spec.description: Total amount of data received by Airlock Microgateway from upstream applications.

spec.title: Request duration
spec.description: Percentiles of the application upstream latency over one minute.

spec.title: 1xx Requests
spec.description: Number of requests with a 1xx response code from application upstreams.

spec.expr: round(sum (increase(envoy_cluster_upstream_rq{managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`${backend_service:regex}`, envoy_response_code=~"1.."}[$__range])) or on () vector(0))

spec.title: 2xx Requests
spec.description: Requests per second to upstream applications by their actual response code (2xx).

spec.title: TLS Connection Handshakes
spec.description: Number of successful TLS handshakes to upstream backends.

spec.title: TLS Connection Error Rate
spec.description: Percentage of TLS connection errors to upstream backends (does not include failed certificate verifications).

spec.expr:
sum (increase(envoy_cluster_ssl_connection_error{managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`${backend_service:regex}`}[$__range]))/
sum (increase(envoy_cluster_ssl_handshake{managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`${backend_service:regex}`}[$__range]))

spec.title: TLS Connection Errors
spec.description: Number of TLS connection errors to upstream backends (does not include failed certificate verifications).

spec.title: TLS Connections
spec.description: TLS connection handshakes and number of TLS connection errors per second.

spec.title: TLS Protocols
spec.description: TLS protocols by versions used in successful TLS connections.

spec.title: TLS Ciphers
spec.description: TLS ciphers used in successful TLS connections.

spec.title: TLS Supported Groups
spec.description: TLS supported groups used in successful TLS connections.

spec.title: Time to Connect
spec.description: Histogram on time to connect to upstream applications.

spec.title: TLS Signature Algorithms
spec.description: TLS signature algorithms used in successful TLS connections.

spec.title: Data sent
spec.description: Rate of traffic sent to upstream applications.

spec.title: Connection Length
spec.description: Histogram on the duration of connections to upstream applications.

spec.name: operator
spec.label: Microgateway Operator
spec.description: Allows filtering on the managing operator instance.

spec.name: namespace
spec.label: Gateway Namespace
spec.description: Allows filtering on the namespaces in which gateways are deployed.

spec.name: gateway_name
spec.label: Gateway Name
spec.description: Allows filtering on specific gateway instance names within the selected namespaces.

spec.name: backend_service
spec.label: Backend Service
spec.description: Allows filtering request metrics of the selected Gateway instances on the name of their matching backend Service.
